violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Observed ice scoop and scoop in seasoning laying handle down in product. Scoop must be stored out of product or handle up.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Observed grease and food debris buildup on and around table under deep fryer. Needs to be cleaned more frequent.
